economic_mechanism: Gradual information diffusion and trend-following demand can produce underlying continuation after a completed 20-session breakout above a fully warmed lagged SMA100, but the fixed 14-DTE one-dollar bull-call expression must retain that edge after adverse multi-leg costs and one-global-unit portfolio management.
candidate_or_family_scope: MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 on frozen AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, AMZN, META, GOOGL, AMD, and TSLA blueprints; 168 original development entries are the primary decision population and the previously opened 113-row holdout is labeled secondary stress only; exact one-dollar width, listed-expiry proxy selection, next-session entry, contract-expiration precedence, 50%-of-max-value harvest, pre-breakout-high invalidation, hard ten-session stop, no same-bar reentry, dual percentage/fixed-dollar cost axes, one global open unit, capital_fit_usd=92.56501618263479, max_loss_usd=246.90032488027197, max_lots=1.
falsifier: Close the exact option-expression family unless every primary development and labeled secondary-stress gate passes conjunctively: minimum event/portfolio populations and symbol breadth, positive event and portfolio total PnL after each adverse cost axis, one-lot max loss no greater than 300 USD, rolling-window max drawdown no greater than 75 USD, and no more than five dense negative windows; no retuning or subset salvage after inspection.

strategy_advancement.summary: The fixed bull-call expression failed 16 predeclared conjunctive checks and remains at F2; the exact family is closed rather than promoted to F3/L1/paper eligibility.

search_information.summary: The wake translated a previously successful underlying continuation signal into an explicit one-lot option payoff path and learned that the frozen bull-call expression does not survive realistic cost, drawdown, density, and secondary-stress gates. It also hardened replay evidence and preserved completed-epoch orientation for the successor wake.

useful_deltas.summary: Closed the exact MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 expression after a deterministic v7 retest reproduced FAMILY_CLOSED with 16 failed checks, capital_fit_usd 92.56501618263479, max_loss_usd 246.90032488027197, and unchanged substantive evidence apart from the repaired management label.

Added a reusable frozen bull-call payoff lab with exact-width/listed-expiry proxy selection, signed adverse closing friction, expiration and management precedence, one-global-unit admission, dual-cost conjunctive gates, strict JSON, overwrite refusal, and deterministic normalized evidence hashing; behavioral, boundary, and negative-control tests exercise the machinery.

Repaired BUILD orientation so a completed search epoch remains authoritative context until replaced, including status, epoch identity, reassessment, charter, goal, and success-definition fields; a regression test proves completed-epoch preservation.

critic_findings.finding: The charter and emitted payload omitted contract-expiration precedence even though the implementation enforced it before other exits.
critic_findings.rationale: The charter and emitted exit_management label now state expiration-session precedence explicitly; the sparse-calendar boundary test proves the behavior, and the v7 retest preserved the FAMILY_CLOSED decision.

critic_findings.finding: Orientation parsed the completed current search epoch as null, losing successor-wake context.
critic_findings.rationale: Completed epochs now remain loadable context until a successor epoch replaces them, and the regenerated orientation carries the completed breakout-payoff epoch fields.

critic_findings.finding: Overwrite refusal and normalized replay hashing were demonstrated manually but lacked durable unit coverage.
critic_findings.rationale: A normalized_evidence_sha256 helper excludes only generated_at, a negative control proves substantive changes alter the hash, and a CLI test proves overwrite refusal preserves existing bytes even when input paths are invalid.

critic_findings.finding: The successor NEXT should require one genuinely new candidate and one F0 mechanism test rather than merely one experiment.
critic_findings.rationale: No additional repair was required: merged-next-seed.md already uses the challenger-strengthened wording, explicitly requiring one genuinely new candidate and one predeclared F0 mechanism test while quarantining the closed bull-call DNA. The same single seed is propagated to final wake/readiness surfaces.

closed_families: MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1: exact frozen 14-DTE one-dollar-width listed-expiry proxy bull-call expression with dual adverse cost axes and one-global-unit management
data_dependencies: Broad observed historical option contract, quote, IV-path, and complete entry/exit join coverage is required before any future related candidate may claim L1 calibration rather than labeled Black-Scholes proxy evidence.
Fresh live-clock paper quotes and fills are required after a distinct capital-seat candidate reaches F3 before any F4 or authority discussion.
next: THETA_EXPRESSIONS_NONMONOTONIC_PAYOFF_F0: in the next zero-input BUILD wake, use the current full-universe rank to select where risk belongs, then search a non-monotonic theta-led payoff class that is not the closed bull-call expression: broken-wing/iron butterfly, asymmetric iron condor, or calendar/diagonal chosen from current regime, liquidity, and capital fit. Freeze symbol(s), exact legs, DTE, delta/width, debit-or-credit bounds, entry timing, profit/stop/time exits, assignment/dividend handling, and one-lot capital_fit_usd/max_loss_usd/max_lots before outcomes; require one genuinely new candidate and one predeclared F0 mechanism test using labeled Black-Scholes/listed-expiry proxy over historical underlying paths with chronology, dual multi-leg costs, overlap/concentration controls, negative controls, and no subset salvage. Reuse the option payoff lab when useful but do not retune or reopen MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1. Discovery bar only: no L1, registry auto-promote, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, or live action.
